emotional_tone: Intellectually serious, structured, yet modern and approachable.

rules: DO NOT use Inter, Roboto, Space Grotesk, Geist, or Plus Jakarta Sans.
Headings must use EB Garamond for a scholarly, serious academic feel.
Body text must use Outfit for excellent legibility and a modern touch.
Audit logs MUST use JetBrains Mono (e.g. AUD-YYYYMMDD-NNNN).
Ensure minimum 4.5:1 contrast ratio for all text.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing (Tailwind Scale). Use 2-3x more spacing than typical SaaS apps to simulate 'breathing room' on a printed page.

grid_modes.landing_page: The 'Tetris' Grid (Mode A) - grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8 to gap-12, asymmetrical layout.
grid_modes.dashboard: The 'Control Room' Grid (Mode B) - grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6. Every pixel utilized, structured, dense but readable.

spacing_and_layout.alignment: Optical alignment over geometrical. Left-align dense content/paragraphs. Center-align only for hero titles if visually balanced.

surfaces_and_borders.cards: Flat solid backgrounds (#FFFFFF) with 1px border (border-[#E2E0D8]). Max border-radius 8px (rounded-lg).
surfaces_and_borders.hover_state: Slight lift (-translate-y-1) and soft ambient shadow (shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(29,45,80,0.08)]) on interactive cards.
surfaces_and_borders.header: Crystal Glass variant. backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#F8F6F0]/85 with a delicate 1px bottom border.
surfaces_and_borders.inputs: Shadcn defaults customized to max 8px radius, 1px border, focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1D2D50].

motion_and_interaction.hover: Explicit text color changes on hover (e.g., hover:bg-[#1D2D50] hover:text-white).
motion_and_interaction.entrance: Staggered fade-up for dashboard widgets and feed items.

components_strategy.base: Shadcn UI (highly customized) + Tailwind CSS + Radix primitives.

specific_features.pdf_viewer: Split pane layout. Left: PDF document. Right: 'Deep Feedback' AI chat & Concept Map (Peta Konsep).
specific_features.concept_map: Use reactflow or visually similar node-based pure HTML/SVG layout for 'Belajar Dulu' mode.
specific_features.hots_quiz: Card-based interface with clear typography, using primary accent (#1D2D50) for selection and secondary/tertiary for correct/incorrect feedback.
specific_features.audit_log: Dense table view using JetBrains Mono for log IDs and timestamps.
specific_features.icons: Use 'lucide-react' for UI interactions, maintaining consistent stroke width.

testing_attributes.rule: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute.

rules: Main agent relies ENTIRELY on these MEDIA URLs. No placeholders allowed.

images.description: Abstract 3D composition representing artificial intelligence analyzing academic papers. Use for the Landing Page hero section.
Subtle textured background representing a concept map. Use as background for 'Belajar Dulu' mode or empty states.
images.alt_text: Neural network and concept map background texture

images.description: Minimalist 3D illustration of a university student workspace. Use for the Onboarding Profile setup screen.

instructions_to_main_agent: Load EB Garamond, Outfit, and JetBrains Mono from Google Fonts.
Follow the 'Scholarly Editorial' aesthetic strictly. Do not use generic SaaS blues or neon colors.
Translate all UI text to Bahasa Indonesia as requested in the problem statement.
Ensure the PDF upload area has a clear dashed border (border-dashed border-[#E2E0D8]) and hover state.
When implementing the Dashboard, use the 'Control Room' grid (Mode B) and do not center-align the widgets.
Never use placeholders for images; strictly use the provided media URLs.
Ensure 'data-testid' is present on all actionable elements.
